meta.title: {app} — Fresh traditional breads, delivered to your door
meta.description: Sarko Delivery bakes national and traditional breads and delivers them to your door in Berlin, Hamburg, Frankfurt and München. Free delivery, pay cash on arrival.

hero.eyebrow: Baked with tradition · Delivered in Germany
hero.sub: National and traditional breads and baked goods, baked to order and brought straight to your home. Free delivery — pay cash when it arrives.
hero.sceneCaption: On its way to your door

features.deliverySub: No delivery fees, ever. The price you see is the price you pay.
features.cashSub: No cards, no prepayment. Pay in cash when your bread arrives.
features.freshSub: National recipes baked the way they have always been baked.
features.chatSub: Questions about an order? Chat with our team right in the app.

how.title: How it works
how.sub: From our oven to your table in three simple steps.
how.step1Sub: Pick your favourite breads and baked goods in the app or in your browser and place your order in minutes.
how.step2Sub: We bake your order fresh and schedule it for the next delivery day in your city.
how.step3Sub: Your order arrives at your door — pay cash on delivery and enjoy it warm.

cities.title: Where we deliver
cities.sub: Door delivery in four German cities — and counting.

getApp.title: Get the {app} app
getApp.sub: Order in a couple of taps, chat with our team and track your deliveries — free on Android and iOS.

cta.title: Hungry for real bread?
cta.sub: Fresh, traditional and at your door — with free delivery and cash payment on arrival.

footer.brandSub: Traditional breads and baked goods, baked fresh and delivered to your door.
